name: Skip Hall
abstract: Archie "Skip" Hall (September 27, 1909, Portsmouth, Virginia – November 1980, Ottawa) was an American jazz arranger, pianist, and organist. Hall studied piano under his father and lived in New York from age eight.

about_quotes.speaker: Buddy Tate
about_quotes.evidence: Skip Hall is one of the best small band arrangers I ever met in my life.

about_quotes.speaker: Gene Ramey
about_quotes.evidence: Sometimes McShean would walk off and Skip was glad to get over there and play.
